pauli.meta: Pauli BestPrice Thailand — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
pauli.title: Pauli BestPrice Thailand — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
pauli.subtitle: Our Price Comparison Portal
pauli.pageDesc:
Pauli BestPrice Thailand is a state-of-the-art, AI-powered price comparison and market optimization portal developed specifically for the Thai retail market. The outstanding core feature of this application is its uncompromising accessibility: the entire app was architecturally designed so that people with physical limitations or disabilities can operate it fully without a keyboard or manual screen input.

Control is 100% via an advanced AI speech recognition matrix. The user simply speaks the product or service they are looking for. The app captures the request, automatically determines the device system language, and switches the entire system to the user's native language.

In the background, AI scans Thai online platforms, merchant databases, and local offers in real time, filters the best conditions, and presents the lowest-priced result. The icon is integrated on the website as a floating, diamond-cut 3D baht coin (฿) without background. Download is via an intelligent universal QR code that leads Android users directly to a choice between the Google Play Store and the open Aptoide marketplace.
pauli.lead: Pauli BestPrice is a product of Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd. — intelligent, transparent, and user-focused.
pauli.text: This page provides information and promotional material about the Pauli BestPrice portal.
pauli.frontWerbetext: Find the absolute best price anywhere in Thailand — without ever typing a single word again! Pauli BestPrice Thailand is the revolutionary flagship among price comparison portals. Why is this app the right choice for you? Because it completely redefines shopping and saving with maximum accessibility. This app was purpose-built for the needs of all users and, through full voice control, is the perfect solution for people with disabilities or physical limitations. Simply speak to the app! The integrated AI searches the entire Thai market in real time, compares offers in a flash, and instantly shows you where you can save the most. The system automatically detects your smartphone language, so you do not have to worry about a thing. End overpriced purchases and complicated searching. Scan the universal QR code and get Thailand's smartest savings tool via the Google Play Store or directly via Aptoide!

omnigate.meta: OmniGate-AI Master — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnigate.title: OmniGate-AI Master — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnigate.subtitle: Interface control for barrier systems
omnigate.pageDesc:
OmniGate-AI Master is the professional, intelligent high-end control center for synchronized management and monitoring of automated gate systems, security fences, and router networks. The app connects via encrypted protocols directly to the control electronics of your access points and the firmware of your network routers.

Through integrated, advanced AI speech processing, the app understands natural voice commands instantly and executes them in milliseconds. That means maximum accessibility: a simple spoken sentence is enough to open, close, or lock heavy industrial gates, garage doors, or security swing gates.

In the network domain, the integrated AI master monitors router activity, secures Wi-Fi against unauthorized access, and optimizes data flows fully automatically. The app requires no manual language settings; it detects the smartphone system language at startup and seamlessly adapts the entire user interface and voice feedback. Download is accessible via the universal QR code with automatic routing for iOS and Android systems, including Google Play and the alternative Aptoide platform.
omnigate.frontWerbetext: Security and convenience on an entirely new level — that is OmniGate-AI Master! Why struggle with complicated remotes, vulnerable keypad locks, or unreliable networks? This app is the right choice because it unites full control over your automated gate systems and your entire router infrastructure in a single, highly secure platform. You never have to hunt for buttons or painstakingly type passwords again. Simply speak to your app! It was purpose-built to work fully accessibly via voice command — ideal for maximum convenience and essential for people with physical limitations. Trust German engineering quality combined with smart AI security for your home. Get master control now via the universal QR code on the Play Store or Aptoide!

omnifix.meta: OmniFix AI Document — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnifix.title: OmniFix AI Document — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnifix.subtitle: AI document analysis & structuring
omnifix.pageDesc:
OmniFix AI-Dokument is a highly specialized, AI-powered application for automated correction, stylistic optimization, and structural reorganization of text, documents, and PDF correspondence. After uploading or pasting text, artificial intelligence performs an in-depth linguistic analysis.

The system does not merely correct simple spelling and grammar errors — it optimizes the entire writing style toward highly professional expression. A core feature of the app is intelligent document structuring: paragraphs are logically ordered, formatting is adjusted, and correspondence is transformed into polished, complete layouts.

The app operates fluently in multiple languages and automatically detects the smartphone's preset system language to ensure accessible handling without manual configuration. Integration on the homepage uses a floating, chrome-finished 3D icon design without background. The download process is controlled via a universal QR code that gives Android device users the choice to install the app through the Google Play Store or the open Aptoide platform.
omnifix.frontWerbetext: Elevate your documents, contracts, and correspondence to absolute premium level! OmniFix AI-Dokument is the professional secret weapon for flawless text and legally sound structure. Why is this app the right choice for you? Because it puts an end to embarrassing grammar mistakes, unprofessional wording, and cluttered document layouts. Whether business emails, official PDF letters, or contracts — our artificial intelligence analyzes your text in real time and optimizes it at the touch of a button. You do not need to be a language expert; the app polishes every text to a high gloss and structures it flawlessly. Save valuable time and impress customers, authorities, and partners with truly professional documents. Download the app now via the universal QR code and experience AI text optimization at its finest — available flexibly on the Google Play Store and Aptoide!

omniqr.meta: OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omniqr.title: OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omniqr.subtitle: Payment API for the tourism sector
omniqr.pageDesc:
OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand is a highly advanced, AI-driven cross-border payment system that establishes a direct interface with the Thai PromptPay standard and international payment systems. Core functionality is built on an accessible voice and recognition matrix designed specifically for comfortable, unrestricted use.

The user does not need to manually enter numeric values into an input field. Instead, they communicate directly with the app by voice. AI instantly recognizes the smartphone's country of origin and automatically switches the user interface and speech recognition to the respective system language (e.g. German, Thai, or Polish).

When scanning a PromptPay QR code, the app determines the Thai baht amount, converts it in real time at the current live rate into the user's home currency (such as Euro or Złoty), and securely executes the transaction after biometric confirmation. The system is highly optimized for cross-platform distribution via a universal QR code that intelligently routes users to the Google Play Store, Apple App Store, or Aptoide depending on their device.
omniqr.descTitle: OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand — Description
omniqr.frontWerbetext: Paying in Thailand has never been so elegant, fast, and secure! OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand is the ultimate companion for tourists, business travelers, and locals alike. Why is this app the best choice for payments? Because it makes the hassle of chasing cash, overpriced exchange booths, and complicated bank forms completely obsolete. With this app, you are instantly part of Thailand's modern PromptPay network. The special advantage: you do not have to painstakingly enter amounts on screen or convert figures in your head. Simply speak to the app! Artificial intelligence understands you in your native language, converts currencies such as Euro or Złoty in real time, and completes the payment in seconds. End payment stress on holiday and choose maximum security and accessibility. Scan the universal QR code and get started with confidence!

terms.s1Text: These Terms and Conditions apply to use of the app 'OmniQR-AI for Tourist of Thailand' by Omni Solutions Global. All contracts are governed exclusively by the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Place of jurisdiction is the Kingdom of Thailand.
terms.s2Text: Download and installation of the app are completely free for the user. Use requires acceptance of these terms at app start. If the user refuses updated terms, payment functions are automatically locked until confirmation is given again.
terms.s3P1: Billing is based on the current daily rate of the Frankfurt Stock Exchange plus a combined system and processing surcharge of up to 4.5%.
terms.s3P2: Omni Solutions Global acts solely as a technical payment intermediary (gateway) and fully excludes liability for incorrect price displays by local merchants, exchange rate changes, or the quality of goods and services purchased.
terms.s4Text: To ensure system integrity and targeted troubleshooting, support requests automatically and temporarily capture the device model, OS version, IP address and approximate location of the user. Omni Solutions Global does not share or sell personal customer data beyond this technical purpose.

omnibot.meta: OmniBot - AI Profit — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnibot.title: OmniBot - AI Profit — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnibot.subtitle: Autonomous market & revenue optimization
omnibot.pageDesc:
OmniBot - KI Profit is a highly advanced, automated trading and market analysis platform based on artificial intelligence and mathematical algorithms. The application monitors global financial and crypto markets continuously in real time.

The AI bot is capable of processing vast volumes of data, chart patterns, and historical trends in parallel to make trading decisions with maximum statistical probability of success. The system works fully autonomously, executes profit-optimized market actions independently, protects invested capital through automated risk management protocols, and removes the human factor.

The user interface is uncompromisingly accessible and adapts instantly to the smartphone operating system language without manual setup. For quick access, the app is integrated on the homepage via a freestanding, reflective 3D symbol and is distributed via a universal QR code with intelligent routing for iOS and Android (including Google Play Store and Aptoide connectivity).
omnibot.frontWerbetext: Let the most powerful artificial intelligence in the financial world work around the clock for your financial success! OmniBot - KI Profit is the exclusive trading and market optimization app for crypto and financial markets. Why is this app the best choice for you? Because it completely eliminates emotional stress, hours of staring at charts, and the risk of poor decisions. While you sleep, our state-of-the-art AI bot analyzes global markets in millisecond cycles, identifies rising trends, and optimizes trading strategies fully autonomously for maximum profit. The app is structured so simply that both beginners and professionals achieve maximum results immediately. It speaks your language, works fully automatically, and is absolutely secure. Bet on the future of intelligent wealth building. Scan the universal QR code and activate your personal AI profit bot today via the Play Store or Aptoide!

omniaiQr.meta: OmniAI-QR Code Generator — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omniaiQr.title: OmniAI-QR Code Generator — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omniaiQr.subtitle: Dynamic industrial QR codes
omniaiQr.pageDesc:
The OmniAI-QR Code Generator is a professional, AI-powered application for creating and managing dynamic, universal QR codes for advanced marketing and distribution structures. The application differs fundamentally from static systems through its integrated intelligent routing technology.

A QR code generated with this app analyzes the metadata of the accessing device at the moment of scanning. It detects the specific operating system (iOS, standard Android, or open Android systems) as well as the user's preset system language. Based on this data, the code routes the user via a dynamic switch directly to the appropriate destination.

In this way, cross-platform downloads (such as seamless assignment between Google Play Store and Aptoide for Android users) can be realized through a single printed or digital code. The app interface automatically adapts to the smartphone system language, is fully accessible to operate, and integrates seamlessly into the floating, chrome-finished 3D design of the corporate group. Download of the app is via the homepage's universal QR system.
omniaiQr.frontWerbetext: Create the smartest and most powerful QR codes in modern marketing! The OmniAI-QR Code Generator is the professional all-in-one platform for future-proof customer routing and dynamic marketing. Why is this app the best choice for your business? Because conventional, static QR codes simply are not enough today. This app generates universal, AI-driven marketing codes that think ahead: when scanned, they automatically detect the customer's device operating system and route users instantly to the exactly right store — whether Google Play, Apple App Store, or Aptoide! Perfect for posters, flyers, and digital media. The app is extremely easy to use, runs fully automatically in your smartphone language, and offers maximum clarity. Make your marketing measurable and efficient. Download the app now via the universal download code and get started!

omnicad.meta: OmniCAD-AI CAM — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnicad.title: OmniCAD-AI CAM — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnicad.subtitle: AI-powered CAD/CAM automation
omnicad.pageDesc:
OmniCAD-AI CAM is the revolutionary, AI-powered complete solution for millimeter-accurate capture, technical drawing, and material calculation of rooms. The workflow is groundbreaking in its simplicity: the user stands in the center of the room and captures the entire surroundings in a single panoramic sweep with the camera. Artificial intelligence analyzes the video footage in real time and automatically generates a highly precise technical 3D drawing including all exact wall lengths, heights, and angles.

The app includes specialized modules for every trade:

  • FOR PAINTERS AND WALLPAPERERS: Instantly calculates the exact surface area of walls and ceilings. It outputs the precise quantity of wall paint, primer, or plaster required — directly in kilograms or liters.
  • FOR FLOORING INSTALLERS: Determines the exact square meterage for tiles, parquet, or laminate and automatically factors in necessary cutting waste, so you buy exactly what you need.
  • FOR ELECTRICIANS: AI analyzes the room and shows strategically optimal placements for new outlets and switches. At the same time, the app calculates the exact cable length required for installation.
  • FOR PLUMBERS: Provides intelligent structuring for bathrooms and toilets to position connections and fixtures in a space-saving, code-compliant layout.

The app runs entirely in the background in the operating system language, offers maximum accessibility through intuitive guidance, and routes users via the integrated universal QR code to the correct app store across platforms (including full Aptoide support for open Android devices).
omnicad.frontWerbetext: Say goodbye to tape measures, inaccurate sketches, and nasty surprises when buying materials! OmniCAD-AI CAM is the definitive milestone for the job site and home renovation. Why is this app the right choice for you? Because it transforms complex engineering into an effortless one-click solution. You do not need to be a professional or learn complicated software. The app turns your smartphone into an intelligent, vision-enabled site manager that thinks ahead, saves costs, and eliminates errors before they happen. Whether you are a professional tradesperson looking to save time or a homeowner who wants to renovate perfectly — this app has you covered. It is radically accessible, extremely fast, and automatically adapts to your smartphone language. Scan the universal QR code and experience the future of space planning. Android users enjoy complete freedom when downloading — choose between the Google Play Store and Aptoide!

omnitalk.meta: OmniTalk-AI Live — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnitalk.title: OmniTalk-AI Live — Omni Solutions Global® Co. Ltd.
omnitalk.subtitle: Real-time AI voice communication
omnitalk.pageDesc:
OmniTalk-AI Live is a revolutionary, AI-powered communication application for fully automatic real-time simultaneous interpretation of ongoing phone calls. The technological innovation of this app lies in its deep system integration: the program requires no manual activation and no calling through a separate third-party platform.

As soon as a regular phone call arrives on the smartphone and the system registers a foreign language, AI switches on fully automatically and without activation delay directly into the audio data stream of the call. The app analyzes spoken words in real time, translates them in a fraction of a second into the user's native language, and plays back the result.

For the other party, the translation is output via an advanced Voice-Cloning module — meaning the conversation partner hears the translation in their own language, yet it is acoustically generated with the user's familiar voice and intonation. The system is uncompromisingly accessible, reads all menu items aloud in the detected system language, and is displayed on the website as a freely floating, chrome-finished 3D handset symbol without background. Download is via the universal QR code with integrated routing for Google Play and Aptoide.
omnitalk.frontWerbetext: Break down every language barrier in the world in a single second — right while you are on a normal phone call! OmniTalk-AI Live is the absolute sensation in the communications market and the right choice for worldwide connections. Why do you need this app on your smartphone immediately? Because it ends misunderstandings and complicated translation tools. Imagine: someone calls you and speaks Thai, Polish, or English. You do not need to open a separate app, press buttons, or activate anything. OmniTalk-AI Live automatically hooks directly into your ongoing phone call, recognizes the foreign language in real time, and interprets the conversation in a fraction of a second! And the best part: the app does not translate with a robotic computer voice — it uses your own AI-adapted voice for the other party! Call customers, friends, or authorities worldwide as if you were speaking the same language. Scan the universal QR code and get this groundbreaking technology now on the Play Store or Aptoide!

security.architectureP1: To ensure radical accessibility and delay-free real-time speech generation for millions of parallel users, this platform runs on a decentralized GPU-accelerated enterprise-grade high-performance cluster.
security.architectureP2: All audio streams and market data reconciliations are protected by military-grade end-to-end encryption under modern quantum security standards. Server infrastructure is redundantly protected against system failures.
security.intrusionNotice: NOTICE: You are operating in legally impermissible territory. Unauthorized attempts to extract source code, assets, or copyrighted algorithms from this platform constitute a fundamental violation of global integrity policies.
security.intrusionWarning: Withdraw from developer interfaces immediately. Your manipulation attempt has been logged.

opsVoiceCheck.title: Ops — Read-Aloud Live Check
opsVoiceCheck.meta: Manual verification of TTS keys and endpoints on the live server.
opsVoiceCheck.heading: Read-aloud — live server diagnostics
opsVoiceCheck.intro: Verify that API keys, endpoints, and the brand voice are correctly configured on production. Without valid configuration the read-aloud button stays silent.
opsVoiceCheck.tokenHint: Set the token only in server .env. Stored in this session only.
opsVoiceCheck.runIssues: There are warnings or errors — see details below.
opsVoiceCheck.publicReady: Public status: read-aloud ready on server.

detail.keyMissing: API key missing — Thai and other non-XTTS languages stay silent.
detail.xttsOffline: XTTS offline — normal on live; ElevenLabs must be active then.
detail.corsWildcard: CORS is * — set a specific domain for production.
detail.omniSecretDevDefault: Production mode but still using dev default secret.
detail.smtpOutboxOnly: No SMTP — tickets go to outbox folder only.
detail.opsTokenNotConfigured: OSG_OPS_CHECK_TOKEN missing on server — ops page disabled.
